payload.answer: The new statement may supersede the existing memory: the existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, while the new statement says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available are: approve_supersession to treat the new statement as replacing the older job memory, keep_both to retain both statements if the situation is uncertain or both may be relevant, reject_new to keep only the existing memory and not store the new claim, or edit to revise the memory before saving.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements appear to refer to the same person, Sam, but no stable entity ID was provided.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Explained the conflict using only backend-supplied safe actions.
Did not commit a durable memory or present superseded information as current.
